benefits.description: enhanced libido effects, notably wild erections

side_effects.description: libido effects diminished after prolonged use

protocol_notes: User has been using MT2 for over a year. New vial has different stopper (broken circle, different texture) but same supplier, same manufacturer. Batch test results show 99.7% purity consistent with previous batches. User reports satisfaction with source and results. Mentions tolerance to libido effects after prolonged use.
